column8: Weak to moderately weak, brownish pink spotted black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE No recovery 25.39-25.44m.

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese kaolin and chlorite stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 30 degrees-40 degrees, 65 degrees-80 degrees
